---
title: time-naming
description: "Avoid unit suffixes on time.Duration values."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Avoid unit suffixes on time.Duration values. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
var timeoutSeconds time.Duration
```

## Good

```go
var timeout time.Duration
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only time-naming`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
